page_content:
Formerly: GERM458.

Additional Information: Taught in German.

GERS473 Variation in Contemporary German Language (3 Credits) Examines the unique, multilingual society that is modern Germany, exploring issues such as regional varieties, gendered language, language reform (and resistance to it), public and media speech, the influence of American English on colloquial speech and in specific fields, and the problems of immigrant communities acquiring both dialect and standard German.
